diagrams.title: fork() vs vfork() Memory Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows how fork() creates separate address space copies while vfork() shares the same memory
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the fundamental difference between fork and vfork memory management

diagrams.title: vfork() Execution Flow
diagrams.description: Timeline showing parent suspension and child execution sequence
diagrams.purpose: Understand the blocking behavior and execution sequence in vfork()

diagrams.title: Return Values of vfork()
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing return value based on process context
diagrams.purpose: Remember the return value logic easily
